node.title: Need guidance: Stuck in a support role, want to transition into SWE roles

article.title: Need guidance: Stuck in a support role, want to transition into SWE roles
article.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m seeking guidance on my career transition. I graduated in 2024 with a BTech in Computer Science and Engineering and have been working for the past 10 months as a NOC(Network Operations & Cloud) Engineer at a US-based product company.

Here’s what my day-to-day work involves:-
- Monitoring dashboards, identifying SEVs, logging and managing tickets
- Basic troubleshooting on the infrastructure side
- Low-level OS patching
- Working with AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes during deployments
- Writing Python scripts for automation

While I’ve gained some exposure to cloud and infrastructure, most of the work feels repetitive and operational. I feel like I’m not growing as an engineer and that this role is holding me back from my real interests.

Here’s my technical background:

- Strong data structures and algorithms skills with over 900 problems solved and a 1750 rating.
- Built and deployed full-stack projects using Java, Spring Boot, Spring Security, Hibernate, React, Docker, AWS and Angular
- Developed Good machine learning projects during weekends
- Earned AWS Cloud Practitioner certification and currently working towards AWS Solutions Architect certification
- Also certified in OCI DevOps

During my final year placements, I interviewed for Software Engineer roles at companies like Amazon, Uber, Salesforce, and Informatica but unfortunately didn’t clear the final rounds

I genuinely dislike my current role in NOC as it feels like I’m not utilizing my skills and potential. I really want to transition into a Software Engineer role.

My questions:

1. Is it realistically possible to move from NOC to SWE or atleast SRE after about a year of Support experience?
2. What should I prioritize to make this switch like personal projects, certifications, open-source contributions, or focused interview preparation?
3. Should I first try to move internally to a development or SRE team in my current company, or start applying externally right away?
4. How can I present my NOC experience on my resume so that it supports my application for SWE or SRE roles rather than holding me back?

Any advice or personal experiences from others who have made a similar transition would be really helpful.

Thanks in advance.
